title: HM Shulkers
description: Replaces Shulker Boxes with a set of carefully designed, vanilla-friendly utility containers
body:
**HM Shulkers replaces the standard Shulker Box textures with a set of carefully designed, vanilla-friendly utility containers. Say goodbye to the whimsical Shulker box aesthetic and welcome a more practical and cohesive storage solution to your world.**

The new textures try to blend in with existing vanilla textures while keeping at least a hint of the original color.

Optifine not required.

List of Shulker Box designs:

- White - Fridge
- Light gray - Safe
- Gray - Iron box
- Black - Mailbox
- Brown - Night table
- Red - Apple crate
- Orange - Cardboard box
- Yellow - Bamboo basket
- Lime - Mossy cage
- Green - Backpack
- Cyan - Warped wood crate
- Light blue - Fish tank
- Blue - Suitcase
- Purple - Crimson wood crate
- Magenta - Present
- Pink - Picnic Basket

The default, non-color labeled Shulker box uses the vanilla texture.
